message:
test(ft-5ikbd): runtime JSON Schema conformance for robot envelopes

Adds tests/conformance_robot_envelope_schema.rs — the runtime
validator the conformance audit (commit 51c4f02c7) flagged as
missing. Builds on the dev-dep jsonschema = "0.21" added in 246328aa.

What it does:
- Loads docs/json-schema/wa-robot-envelope.json once and compiles a
  Draft 2020-12 validator (the dialect declared by the committed
  schema's $schema header).
- Discovers every wa_*.json fixture under
  tests/golden_robot_envelope/, extracts the success_envelope field,
  and validates it against the schema. Adding a new fixture
  automatically extends coverage.
- 14 envelopes validated, 1 skipped (wa_tx_toon_conformance.json
  pins a TOON conformance matrix rather than a single envelope —
  surfaced explicitly in the JSON-line phase=skip output).

Falsification gates (so the pass-suite proves something):
- synthetic_envelope_missing_required_field_must_fail — drops
  required `now`, asserts validator rejects.
- synthetic_envelope_with_malformed_error_code_must_fail — uses
  "NotARobotCode" instead of robot.<code>, asserts pattern enforcement.
- synthetic_envelope_ok_true_without_data_must_fail — exercises the
  schema's if/then conditional (ok=true ⇒ data required).

Coverage report:
- fixture_inventory_is_visible prints the discovered fixture list +
  envelope/other tag so a CI reviewer can audit coverage from stdout
  without re-deriving from test results.

Pre-fix the schema files in docs/json-schema/ existed but no test
ever drove a real envelope through them. tests/schema_golden.rs
verifies the schemas are well-formed JSON; this test verifies the
schemas actually accept the envelopes that production emits — the
contract MCP/robot consumers depend on.

Verified locally on macOS:
  cargo test -p frankenterm-core --no-default-features
    --test conformance_robot_envelope_schema
  → 5 passed, 0 failed in 0.10s after a 1.15s incremental build.

Bead: ft-5ikbd (this fix). Audit notes that filed it: 51c4f02c7.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
